title: To Carnations: A Song
content:
Stay while ye will, or go,
And leave no scent behind ye:
Yet trust me, I shall know
The place where I may find ye.

Within my Lucia's cheek,
(Whose livery ye wear)
Play ye at hide or seek,
I'm sure to find ye there.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "To Carnations: A Song"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
